title: Highlander III: The Sorcerer
tagline: Centuries ago one man was chosen to protect all that is good. But an enemy from the past has traveled through time to challenge him in the present.
overview: Deceived that he had won the Prize, Connor MacLeod wanders through the world; however, he is awakened from his peaceful life when an entombed immortal magician, Kane, escapes and comes seeking the Highlander.
